query:
INSERT INTO lessons (courseId, title, content, lessonOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT c.id, CONCAT('Lesson 1: ', c.title), 'Course content', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses c WHERE c.code IN ('BIB101','BIB102','THE201','BIB201','DIV101','THE301','DIV102','MIN101','MIN102','SPR101','LED202','PAS201','PAS301','PAS101','SPR201','WOR101','DIV111','DIV112','DIV113')
UNION ALL SELECT c.id, CONCAT('Lesson 2: ', c.title), 'Course content', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses c WHERE c.code IN ('BIB101','BIB102','THE201','BIB201','DIV101','THE301','DIV102','MIN101','MIN102','SPR101','LED202','PAS201','PAS301','PAS101','SPR201','WOR101','DIV111','DIV112','DIV113')
UNION ALL SELECT c.id, CONCAT('Lesson 3: ', c.title), 'Course content', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses c WHERE c.code IN ('BIB101','BIB102','THE201','BIB201','DIV101','THE301','DIV102','MIN101','MIN102','SPR101','LED202','PAS201','PAS301','PAS101','SPR201','WOR101','DIV111','DIV112','DIV113')
UNION ALL SELECT c.id, CONCAT('Lesson 4: ', c.title), 'Course content', 4, NOW(), NOW() FROM courses c WHERE c.code IN ('BIB101','BIB102','THE201','BIB201','DIV101','THE301','DIV102','MIN101','MIN102','SPR101','LED202','PAS201','PAS301','PAS101','SPR201','WOR101','DIV111','DIV112','DIV113')
